questionHtml: A signal consists of a series of pulses. Outline how the length of the fibre optic cable limits the time between transmission of pulses in a practical system.
markschemeHtml:
longer cables give wider pulses ✔

which overlap/interfere if T too small/f too high ✔

OWTTE
